checks.name: ghostty-launcher validation
checks.output:
diff scripts/lib/prompt-detection.sh.orig scripts/lib/prompt-detection.sh
--- scripts/lib/prompt-detection.sh.orig
+++ scripts/lib/prompt-detection.sh
@@ -25,10 +25,10 @@
 
 	while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
 		lines+=("$line")
-	done <<< "$output"
+	done <<<"$output"
 
 	local idx normalized
-	for ((idx=${#lines[@]} - 1; idx >= 0; idx--)); do
+	for ((idx = ${#lines[@]} - 1; idx >= 0; idx--)); do
 		normalized=$(terminal_normalize_line "${lines[idx]}")
 		if [[ -n "$normalized" ]]; then
 			printf '%s' "$normalized"
shfmt -d -i 0 -ci launcher test/*.sh test/lib/*.sh scripts/lib/*.sh scripts/oste-*.sh
error: Recipe `format-check` failed on line 198 with exit code 1
